# bNumDeviceCaps

**Instance Property**

The number of separate device capability descriptors in the binary object store.

## Declaration

```swift
uint8_t bNumDeviceCaps;
```

## Getting the Properties

- **bLength**: The size of the descriptor.
- **bDescriptorType**: The type of the descriptor.
- **wTotalLength**: The length of this descriptor and all of its subdescriptors.
